phases.name: Project Scaffolding, Domain Model, and Data Layer

tasks.description: Initialize Spring Boot 3.x Maven project with dependencies: spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-data-jpa, SQLite JDBC driver, springdoc-openapi, and JUnit 5. Configure application.yml for SQLite datasource and JPA/Hibernate dialect. (FR-018, FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: Project compiles with mvn compile. SQLite datasource configured. SpringDoc dependency present.

tasks.description: Create JPA entity for Unit with fields: id, name, tier, cost, traits (comma-separated string). Add Hibernate SQLite dialect configuration. (FR-018)
tasks.acceptance: Unit entity compiles. JPA annotations correct. Tier and cost fields present.

tasks.description: Create JPA entity for LevelTierProbability with fields: id, playerLevel, tier, weight. This stores the probability matrix rows. (FR-019)
tasks.acceptance: LevelTierProbability entity compiles with correct JPA annotations.

tasks.description: Create JPA entity for Player with fields: id, name, gold, level. Player represents the in-game player state. (FR-008, FR-009, FR-011, FR-012)
tasks.acceptance: Player entity compiles. Gold and level fields present with appropriate defaults.

tasks.description: Create Spring Data JPA repositories: UnitRepository, LevelTierProbabilityRepository (with findByPlayerLevel query), and PlayerRepository. (FR-018, FR-019)
tasks.acceptance: All three repositories compile. LevelTierProbabilityRepository has findByPlayerLevel method.

tasks.description: Create DTO classes: UnitDto, ShopOfferDto, PoolStatusDto, SynergyResultDto, PurchaseRequestDto, and ErrorResponseDto. All API responses use DTOs, never entities. (FR-020)
tasks.acceptance: All DTO classes compile as Java records. No JPA annotations on DTOs.

tasks.description: Create SQL schema initialization script (schema.sql) and data seed script (data.sql) with unit definitions (at least 3 units per tier across 5 tiers), tier copy limits as constants, and the level-to-tier probability matrix for levels 1-9. (FR-004, FR-018, FR-019, FR-029)
tasks.acceptance: schema.sql creates tables. data.sql seeds units and probability matrix. Application starts and loads data.

tasks.description: Create custom exception classes: InsufficientGoldException, UnitPoolExhaustedException, UnitNotFoundException, InvalidPurchaseException. Each extends RuntimeException with a message field. (FR-026)
tasks.acceptance: All four exception classes compile and extend RuntimeException.

tasks.description: Create GlobalExceptionHandler using @ControllerAdvice that catches all custom exceptions and returns structured JSON ErrorResponseDto with HTTP status codes (400 for business errors, 404 for not found, 409 for conflicts). (FR-025)
tasks.acceptance: GlobalExceptionHandler compiles. Each custom exception maps to correct HTTP status and returns ErrorResponseDto.

tasks.description: Create GameConstants class with named constants for tier copy limits (TIER_1_COPIES=29, TIER_2_COPIES=22, TIER_3_COPIES=18, TIER_4_COPIES=12, TIER_5_COPIES=10), shop size (SHOP_SIZE=5), and roll cost (ROLL_COST=2). No magic numbers. (FR-004, FR-005, FR-008, FR-029)
tasks.acceptance: GameConstants class compiles with all named constants. No magic numbers.

tasks.description: Implement GlobalUnitPool @Component with ConcurrentHashMap-based thread-safe storage. Constructor loads all units from UnitRepository and initializes counts based on tier copy limits from GameConstants. Provides acquire(unitId) and release(unitId) atomic operations using AtomicInteger. (FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-027)
tasks.acceptance: GlobalUnitPool compiles. Uses constructor injection. acquire decrements atomically, returns false if zero. release increments atomically, never exceeds max.

tasks.description: Implement ShopService with weighted tier rolling logic. Method rollShop(playerId): loads player, deducts roll cost (2 gold), fetches probability matrix for player level, performs weighted random tier selection 5 times, selects random available unit from each tier via GlobalUnitPool. Returns list of ShopOfferDto. (FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, FR-009, FR-027)
tasks.acceptance: ShopService compiles. Uses constructor injection. Rolls 5 offers. Deducts gold. Uses weighted random for tier selection.

tasks.description: Implement PurchaseService to handle unit purchases. Method purchaseUnit(playerId, unitId): validates player has sufficient gold, validates unit is available in pool, atomically acquires from pool, deducts gold (cost = tier), adds unit to player bench. (FR-010, FR-011, FR-012, FR-013, FR-027)
tasks.acceptance: PurchaseService compiles. Uses constructor injection. Validates gold and pool availability. Throws InsufficientGoldException or UnitPoolExhaustedException on failure.

tasks.description: Create SynergyStrategy interface with method calculateBonus(int unitCount) returning SynergyBonus record. Implement four concrete strategies: WarriorSynergy (armor bonus at 2/4/6 thresholds), MageSynergy (spell power bonus), AssassinSynergy (critical strike bonus), RangerSynergy (attack speed bonus). Each is a @Component. (FR-015, FR-016, FR-017, FR-027)
tasks.acceptance: SynergyStrategy interface and four implementations compile. Each uses threshold breakpoints. All are @Component with constructor injection.

tasks.description: Implement SynergyEngine @Service that receives all SynergyStrategy implementations via constructor injection (List<SynergyStrategy>). Method calculateSynergies(List<UnitDto> boardUnits): counts units per trait, applies matching strategy for each trait, returns list of SynergyResultDto with active synergies and their bonuses. (FR-014, FR-015, FR-027)
tasks.acceptance: SynergyEngine compiles. Uses constructor injection with List<SynergyStrategy>. Correctly maps traits to strategies and calculates bonuses.

phases.name: REST API Controllers and OpenAPI Integration

tasks.description: Implement ShopController with GET /api/shop/roll/{playerId} endpoint that delegates to ShopService.rollShop() and returns list of ShopOfferDto. Add OpenAPI annotations for Swagger documentation. (FR-021, FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: ShopController compiles. GET endpoint returns ShopOfferDto list. OpenAPI annotations present.

tasks.description: Implement PoolController with GET /api/pool/status endpoint that delegates to GlobalUnitPool to retrieve current counts and returns PoolStatusDto organized by tier. Add OpenAPI annotations. (FR-022, FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: PoolController compiles. GET endpoint returns PoolStatusDto with unit counts by tier.

tasks.description: Implement BenchController with POST /api/bench/purchase endpoint that accepts PurchaseRequestDto (playerId, unitId), delegates to PurchaseService, and returns the purchased UnitDto. Add OpenAPI annotations. (FR-023, FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: BenchController compiles. POST endpoint accepts PurchaseRequestDto and returns UnitDto.

tasks.description: Implement BoardController with GET /api/board/synergies endpoint that accepts a list of unit IDs as query parameters, resolves units, delegates to SynergyEngine, and returns list of SynergyResultDto. Add OpenAPI annotations. (FR-024, FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: BoardController compiles. GET endpoint accepts unit IDs and returns SynergyResultDto list.

tasks.description: Configure SpringDoc OpenAPI bean with API title 'Aegis-AutoChess API', version, and description. Verify Swagger UI is accessible at /swagger-ui.html. (FR-031)
tasks.acceptance: OpenAPI config compiles. Swagger UI accessible. All endpoints documented with schemas.

phases.name: JUnit 5 Test Suite and Final Verification

tasks.description: Write JUnit 5 tests for GlobalUnitPool: test acquire decrements count, test acquire returns false at zero, test release increments count, test release never exceeds max, test concurrent acquire/release with multiple threads (ExecutorService with 100 threads) verifying no count goes below 0 or above max. (FR-030, SC-002)
tasks.acceptance: All GlobalUnitPool tests pass. Concurrency test uses 100+ threads and verifies atomic correctness.

tasks.description: Write JUnit 5 tests for ShopService: test rollShop returns exactly 5 offers, test tier distribution matches probability matrix over 1000 rolls (statistical tolerance), test insufficient gold throws InsufficientGoldException, test pool exhaustion handling. (FR-030, SC-001)
tasks.acceptance: All ShopService tests pass. Distribution test runs 1000 rolls and verifies statistical accuracy.

tasks.description: Write JUnit 5 tests for SynergyEngine: test empty board returns no synergies, test single-trait board at each threshold breakpoint, test multi-trait board with overlapping synergies, test adding a new synergy strategy requires no modification to engine. (SC-004, SC-007)
tasks.acceptance: All SynergyEngine tests pass. Extensibility test demonstrates OCP compliance.

tasks.description: Write JUnit 5 integration test for the purchase flow: create player with gold, roll shop, purchase unit, verify pool count decremented, verify player gold deducted, verify purchasing unavailable unit returns error. Uses @SpringBootTest. (SC-003, SC-005, SC-007)
tasks.acceptance: Integration test passes. Full purchase flow verified end-to-end. Error cases covered.

tasks.description: Run full Maven build (mvn clean verify) to confirm all tests pass, application starts, and Swagger UI is accessible. Fix any remaining compilation or test issues. (SC-006, SC-007)
tasks.acceptance: mvn clean verify succeeds. All tests green. Application starts and Swagger UI loads.
